OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-09-1996, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON AUG-23-1996 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(D) FLORENTINO MIRANDA IS HEREBY DISMISSED PER COURT ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
